budgetPolicy.label: Zero Budget
founderApprovalTriggers: rights or privacy exceptions that set precedent

reasons: At least one proof-ready city asset must exist before widening.
At least one hosted review must run end to end before widening.
At least three approved capturers are required before widening.
At least two capturers must reach onboarded status before widening.

warnings: Sender verification cannot be proven programmatically from env state. Confirm the configured city-launch sender/domain is verified in the active mail provider before claiming outward launchability.
Activation-ready capturer direct-outreach lanes for San Jose, CA have named targets but no explicit contact_email evidence.
